title: Chocolate Pudding
excerpt: Ingredients 65 ml butter 185 ml milk 1 egg 185 ml sugar 250 ml flour 5 ml baking powder 50 ml cocoa pinch of salt vanilla essence Sauce 375 ml boiling water 375 ml sugar 45 ml cocoa Boil together for a few minutes. Method Melt the butter and milk together. Beat the egg and …
html:
Ingredients

  • 65 ml butter
  • 185 ml milk
  • 1 egg
  • 185 ml sugar
  • 250 ml flour
  • 5 ml baking powder
  • 50 ml cocoa
  • pinch of salt
  • vanilla essence

Sauce

  • 375 ml boiling water
  • 375 ml sugar
  • 45 ml cocoa
  • Boil together for a few minutes.

Method

Melt the butter and milk together.

Beat the egg and sugar until light and add the dry ingredients and vanilla.

Grease an oven dish with butter.

Pour the sauce into the bottom of the dish.

Spoon dollops of batter onto the sauce.

Bake for 30 minutes at 180 degrees Celsius.

Serve with cream or ice cream.

Easy!
